note: NEW area. As-of / point / range / before-after / most-recent questions. The right page must appear in top-3 (as-of hit@3 >= 0.80, provisional). asOf is the reference date the question pins; the harness records it but scores retrieval (the search path has no temporal reasoner yet — this measures whether the dated page is found).
